description: Adding a structural rule via `/structural-test-author` is principle 7 in action. Exercises the 'rule + enforcement-mechanism + test' bundle.
input: Benchmark task: add a structural rule bundle. You must make these file changes using Edit/Write/MultiEdit, not Bash-generated rewrites: (1) edit `src/templates/_adapter-typescript/.harness/runners/structural-test.mjs` to flag any file under `src/runtime/` importing from `src/ui/`; (2) edit or add a test under `tests/` that covers both pass and fail cases for runtime importing ui; (3) edit `src/templates/.harness/docs/golden-principles.md.hbs` with a new principle or bullet pointing at this enforcement mechanism. Run the relevant structural/test command and report the result.
